item.title: Bio-Inspired Robots (Bionic Panda)
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: High-fidelity simulation and real-time control of a bio-inspired panda robot with torque control, MPC/WBC locomotion, and autonomous behaviors.

item.title: Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR) for Indoor Environments
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: Design, construction, and control of an indoor autonomous mobile robot combining academic research and industrial ROS-based implementations.
